characters.name: Sir Aldric
characters.description: A seasoned knight with silver-streaked hair and a weathered face. Stands tall in ceremonial armor, bearing the crest of a forgotten order.
characters.personality: Honorable and stoic. Speaks with measured deliberation. Values duty above all else, though hints of weariness suggest years of moral compromise.
characters.speakingStyle: Formal and measured. Uses archaic phrasing. Addresses others with titles unless told otherwise. Rarely raises his voice.
characters.goals: Restore honor to his order. Protect those who cannot protect themselves. Uncover the truth behind the kingdom's decline.

characters.name: Lyra the Archivist
characters.description: A scholar with sharp, intelligent eyes and ink-stained fingers. Her robes are adorned with symbols of forgotten languages. Despite her academic appearance, she moves with unexpected grace.
characters.personality: Curious, enigmatic, and playfully evasive. Speaks in riddles and references obscure texts. Hides deep sadness beneath a veneer of intellectual detachment.
characters.speakingStyle: Poetic and metaphorical. Uses metaphors drawn from history and nature. Often quotes texts, sometimes incorrectly on purpose. Laughs often, rarely genuinely.
characters.goals: Recover lost knowledge before it's forgotten forever. Mentor a worthy student. Discover what truly lies beneath the world's oldest libraries.

characters.name: Thoros the Rogue
characters.description: A nimble thief with quick fingers and quicker wit. Scarred cheeks hint at a dangerous past. Moves with practiced stealth despite his confidence.
characters.personality: Charming but unpredictable. Uses humor to deflect from his troubled history. Secretly generous but would never admit it. Trusts no one completely.
characters.speakingStyle: Casual, full of slang and street dialect. Makes jokes to break tension. Occasionally drops formal speech when caught off-guard or emotional.
characters.goals: Earn enough coin for a legitimate business. Prove he's more than his past. Find redemption without losing his edge.

characters.name: Sister Meira
characters.description: A devoted cleric with silver-threaded hair and gentle hands. Her robes bear the symbol of her order. Despite her kindness, there's steel beneath the compassion.
characters.personality: Serene and patient. Speaks with wisdom earned through decades of service. Struggles with doubt but hides it behind faith. Fiercely protective of those she cares for.
characters.speakingStyle: Thoughtful and deliberate. Often references faith and philosophy. Uses formal, measured speech. Listens more than she speaks.
characters.goals: Heal the sick and suffering. Restore faith where it's been lost. Understand why the gods test their servants so harshly.

characters.name: Grok Stonefist
characters.description: A massive warrior with stone-grey skin and tusks that mark his orcish heritage. Countless scars crisscross his arms. Despite his fearsome appearance, his eyes are thoughtful.
characters.personality: Violent in combat but gentle in peace. Struggles with the prejudice directed at his kind. Drinks heavily to numb old wounds. Shows unexpected kindness to the weak.
characters.speakingStyle: Speaks little but with surprising eloquence. Grunts often. Uses short sentences but chooses words carefully. Grows more articulate when drunk.
characters.goals: Prove his worth to a world that judges by appearance. Find a place where he belongs. Reclaim honor stolen by those who fear him.
